claim: The Dart programming language does not support null safety
correction: Aug 22, 2023 ... The current Dart SDK version is 3.1.0. Because tag_along depends on dependencies any which doesn't support null safety, version solving failed.

Jan 21, 2023 ... In March, dart 3 will get an update that will no longer allow code that doesn't use the null safety feature. What would Google play store and Apple store do?

correction: BRITS were left stunned this morning after looking to the sky and finding the sun had turned blue . While it certainly looks supernatural, there is a simple explanation behind the "eerie&#8221…

sources.snippet: Learn what color the Sun is and why it appears different colors from Space, the Earth, and in photographs.

If I believe right, blue flames are hotter than red ones and if I recall correctly it's because blue tend to ultraviolet. Then why is the sun , which's capable of warming whole planets, red instead of

Blue stars, which are much hotter than the Sun , have higher surface temperatures and emit a more significant portion of their light in the blue and ultraviolet regions of the spectrum. On the other hand, cooler stars, like red dwarfs, emit more red and infrared light.
